text:
Once upon a time in a small, sunny village nestled between rolling hills, there was a curious hedgehog named Harold. Harold was different from all the other animals. Instead of rolling in a nice big ball all the time, he loved to explore. There wasn comer bats.

One twilight, Harold fluttered too close to a big kite glowing with static electricity. He zipped around, electrifying everything in his path. Birds let out squawks, and even the fox paused. A few weeks later, Harold found himself back on the kite. This time, however, a lightning bolt zapped him instead.

When Harold woke up, he discovered he'd been turned into a kite! He floated up into the sky, thrilled at his new wings. Every bird seemed to know him, and he felt like he could reach incredible heights.

Harold's first adventure was chasing sunbeams—much to the delight of the villagers who would watch him sail across fields. He visited forests where the leaves shimmer
